subsidyType: SRF-funded replacement project described through the utility's public notice and map guidance
publicSideCovered: the public notice describes utility-managed replacement work tied to the project area and funding cycle
privateSideCovered: exact private-side cost and eligibility should be confirmed with Council Bluffs Water Works before work begins
propertyRules: eligibility depends on the current project area public notice and utility outreach
contractorRules: CBWW coordinates the project notice timeline map updates and construction communication
